title: Event History
description:
As a product owner, I want every discrete issue action captured as an immutable event history, so that we can audit changes, surface timelines in the UI, and reconstruct state without hidden systems.

Definition of Done:
- Event history is the single source of truth for issue-level actions (no alternate locations).
- Stories under this epic deliver recording, schema, backend retrieval, and frontend display.
creator: ryan

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implementation started. Added event history module (Rust/Python), event directory creation, event writes with rollback across create/update/comment/delete/deps/transfer/beads, console API endpoints for issue events, and UI tab plan in progress. Next: finish UI wiring, docs/tests, run checks, then mark stories done.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: All stories done. Event log implemented (Rust/Python), event dirs created on init, console API + Event History UI tab wired, docs updated. Checks: cargo check (rust) ok. Python tests not run (pytest missing in py311).
